basic_details.job_title: DCPO Tiruvannamalai Social Worker Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: District Child Protection Office (DCPO Tiruvannamalai) Social Worker Notification 2026 has been released on the official website https://tiruvannamalai.nic.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the DCPO Tiruvannamalai Social Worker Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate preferably in BA in Social Work/ Sociology/ Social Sciences from a recognized university
qualification.details: Graduate preferably in BA in Social Work/ Sociology/ Social Sciences from a recognized university. Weightage for work experience candidates. Proficiency in Computers.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DCPO Tiruvannamalai Social Worker Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://tiruvannamalai.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 10-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: DCPO Tiruvannamalai Social Worker Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the DCPO Tiruvannamalai Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Graduate preferably in BA in Social Work/ Sociology/ Social Sciences from a recognized university. Weightage for work experience candidates. Proficiency in Computers.

rows.event: Last Date for Receipt of Application

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for DCPO Tiruvannamalai Social Worker Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://tiruvannamalai.nic.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 10-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: DCPO Tiruvannamalai Social Worker Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Social Worker post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the Social Worker post is 10-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Social Worker position?
faq.answer: Candidates should be graduates, preferably with a BA in Social Work, Sociology, or Social Sciences from a recognized university.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Social Worker recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Social Worker post is 42 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Social Worker role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 18536 Per Month.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the Social Worker position?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted offline by downloading the form from the official website and sending it via post before the last date.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies for the Social Worker post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Social Worker post.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the District Child Protection Office located?
faq.answer: The District Child Protection Office is located in Tiruvannamalai, Tamil Nadu, with the pincode 606601.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website: https://tiruvannamalai.nic.in.
